title: Amazon Agent — Listing Reference (v1)
description: Captured Amazon listing copy for an anchor + its siblings/competitors. Produced by the amazon-listing-capture routine (tools/listing-capture/extract-amazon-listing-copy.js) and consumed by build_keyword_workbook.py -> build_asins, which keys listings by ASIN to fill the ASINs tab's title / bullet_points / link columns. Never include cookies, storage, tokens, or credentials.

capturedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the capture run.

asin.description: The REQUESTED ASIN — the key the builder matches against the ASINs tab. Always set to the requested ASIN even when the page redirects to a variation parent.

resolvedAsin.description: The ASIN the page actually resolved to (e.g. a variation parent), when it differs from the requested asin.

role.description: Optional; the builder also derives role from config + brand match.

bullets.description: Bullet points (array preferred). Source: #feature-bullets ul, fallback #productFactsDesktopExpander > div:first-child ul. The builder joins arrays with newlines.

bullet_points.description: Accepted alias for `bullets` (the builder reads either key).

link.description: Canonical amazon.<tld>/dp/<ASIN>. The builder also accepts 'canonical' or 'url'.

status.description: Keep the row even when title/bullets fail; record the failure here.
